overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running through a grassy meadow at night toward a dark forest. The third-person camera follows from behind as the character moves along an emerging dirt path in a moody, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with distant forest perimeter

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily through open grassland toward the distant tree line, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: expansive field of green grass stretching in all directions
dark silhouette of dense trees forming the horizon boundary
dark blue night sky with faint clouds visible above the trees
narrow dirt trail emerging through the grass as the character progresses
small dark rocks scattered across the grassy terrain

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs through an expansive open meadow at night, surrounded by tall grass with a dark forest visible on the horizon. The terrain is flat and sparsely vegetated, with a dirt path gradually emerging underfoot as the character moves forward.

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to defined dirt trail as vegetation density increases on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues running along the dirt trail toward the forest edge, flanked by tall grass and bushes

entered.detail: dense tall grass and bushes lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a defined dirt trail cutting through dense vegetation. Tall grass and bushes flank both sides of the path while the forest tree line grows larger and more detailed as Geralt approaches. The open meadow gives way to an enclosed trail environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive nighttime meadow that gradually narrows into a dense, enclosed forest trail. It begins with Geralt running across a flat, open landscape of tall grass under a dark sky, with a distant tree line marking the horizon. As he moves forward, a faint dirt path gradually emerges underfoot, guiding the character toward the looming woods. The scene then shifts as the open meadow gives way to a defined dirt trail, with the surrounding vegetation growing thicker and more restrictive. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed by flanking bushes and tall grass as the forest tree line expands to fill the frame.
